targets.rawSql:
;WITH unique_lots AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Part Type],
        [Identical ID],
        [QC Member],
        [Year Record],
        [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],
        [Sequence],
        [Mold No.],
        [M/C No.],
        [Part No.],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC]))            AS isc_clean,
        -- ✅ Step 1: เพิ่ม breakdown columns
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))      AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))    AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))          AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])) AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))   AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))  AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))      AS qc_member_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Status] = 'NG'
        AND [ISC] IS NOT NULL
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC])) != ''
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record]))
                IN (${year:singlequote})
        AND CASE CAST([Month Record] AS INT)
                WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
            END IN (${month:singlequote})
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))
                IN (${mold_no:singlequote})
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))
                IN (${mc_no:singlequote})
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))
                IN (${part_no:singlequote})
),
-- ✅ Step 2: แยก CTE นับ → ตัวเลขไม่เปลี่ยน
ng_count AS (
    SELECT
        isc_clean,
        COUNT(DISTINCT [Identical ID]) AS ng_lot_count
    FROM unique_lots
    GROUP BY isc_clean
),
-- ✅ Step 3: DISTINCT แยกทีละ field ต่อ ISC
d_part    AS (SELECT DISTINCT isc_clean, part_name      FROM unique_lots),
d_mat     AS (SELECT DISTINCT isc_clean, material_no    FROM unique_lots),
d_oi      AS (SELECT DISTINCT isc_clean, oi_no          FROM unique_lots),
d_sample  AS (SELECT DISTINCT isc_clean, sample_part_no FROM unique_lots),
d_lot     AS (SELECT DISTINCT isc_clean, lot_material   FROM unique_lots),
d_cond    AS (SELECT DISTINCT isc_clean, condition_std  FROM unique_lots),
d_qc      AS (SELECT DISTINCT isc_clean, qc_member_val  FROM unique_lots),
-- ✅ Step 4: STRING_AGG รวมแต่ละ field
agg_part   AS (SELECT isc_clean, STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ') AS part_name_agg      FROM d_part   GROUP BY isc_clean),
agg_mat    AS (SELECT isc_clean, STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ') AS material_no_agg    FROM d_mat    GROUP BY isc_clean),
agg_oi     AS (SELECT isc_clean, STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ') AS oi_no_agg          FROM d_oi     GROUP BY isc_clean),
agg_sample AS (SELECT isc_clean, STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ') AS sample_part_no_agg FROM d_sample GROUP BY isc_clean),
agg_lot    AS (SELECT isc_clean, STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ') AS lot_material_agg   FROM d_lot    GROUP BY isc_clean),
agg_cond   AS (SELECT isc_clean, STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ') AS condition_std_agg  FROM d_cond   GROUP BY isc_clean),
agg_qc     AS (SELECT isc_clean, STRING_AGG(qc_member_val,  ' / ') AS qc_member_agg      FROM d_qc     GROUP BY isc_clean)
-- ✅ Step 5: Final SELECT
SELECT
    nc.isc_clean                   AS [ISC],
    nc.ng_lot_count                AS [NG Lot Count],
    ap.part_name_agg               AS [Part Name],
    am.material_no_agg             AS [Material No],
    ao.oi_no_agg                   AS [OI No.],
    asa.sample_part_no_agg         AS [Sample Part No.],
    al.lot_material_agg            AS [Lot Material],
    ac.condition_std_agg           AS [Condition STD],
    aq.qc_member_agg               AS [QC Member]
FROM ng_count              AS nc
LEFT JOIN agg_part         AS ap  ON ap.isc_clean  = nc.isc_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_mat          AS am  ON am.isc_clean  = nc.isc_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_oi           AS ao  ON ao.isc_clean  = nc.isc_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_sample       AS asa ON asa.isc_clean = nc.isc_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_lot          AS al  ON al.isc_clean  = nc.isc_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_cond         AS ac  ON ac.isc_clean  = nc.isc_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_qc           AS aq  ON aq.isc_clean  = nc.isc_clean
ORDER BY nc.isc_clean ASC

panels.title: NG BY ISC CODE (filtered by part)

list.definition:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
list.label: Month
list.name: month
list.query:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT CAST([Year Record] AS VARCHAR(10)) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 1 DESC
list.label: Year
list.name: year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT CAST([Year Record] AS VARCHAR(10)) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part Type] = 'Injection'
  AND [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'  -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Mold No.
list.name: mold_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part Type] = 'Injection'
  AND [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'  -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part Type] = 'Injection'
  AND [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})        -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: M/C No.
list.name: mc_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __value

  AND [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part Type] = 'Injection'
  AND [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})        -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))  IN (${mc_no:singlequote})          -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Part No.
list.name: part_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part Type] = 'Injection'
  AND [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})        -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))  IN (${mc_no:singlequote})          -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
